description:
Modify daemon_scheduler_project_tick to read from the EM work queue when it exists and is non-empty. The queue takes precedence over the current naive task picker.

Behavior:
- If work queue has entries, pop the next N tasks (up to max_agents) and start workflows
- If work queue is empty, fall back to current priority-based picker
- After starting a workflow, mark the queue entry as "assigned"
- On workflow completion/failure, remove the entry
- Log which source selected each task (em_queue vs fallback_picker)
title: Wire daemon scheduler to consume EM work queue
